name: Document Specialist Skill
description: AI-powered software documentation automation using Progressive Documentation Architecture (PDA). Automates the creation and maintenance of technical documentation, solving a major pain point for development teams with an innovative structured approach.
review: Innovative PDA (Progressive Documentation Architecture) approach to software documentation automation. Excellent documentation quality and solves a major pain point for development teams. Strong score of 8.0/10 with approval from Gamora.

drax_results.notes: Documentation automation skill verified. PDA architecture functional.
